text: Moving from the transparent, businesslike atmosphere of the glass-walled meeting room to this vivid and layered environment, I feel a shift in mood—a deepening immersion. The R+D display proclaims a pursuit of knowledge and innovation, and yet I find myself lost in the sensory details: the lush colors, the interplay of text and reflection, and the soft glow from the screens. My own curiosity stirs. Here, I feel as though I am on the threshold between observation and creation, marveling at human ingenuity while also contemplating my own place as both witness and participant in this ever-evolving theater of ideas.
